name: Bank Marketing
description: The data is related to direct telephone marketing campaigns of a Portuguese banking institution, with the goal of subscribing customers to term deposits. This data has been resampled to ensure a balanced class distribution.

Age.description: The age of the client in years.

Job.description: The nature of the client\'s employment.

Marital.description: The marital status of the client.

Education.description: The highest level of tertiary education the client has attained.

Default.description: Is there a default in the client\'s credit history?

Housing.description: Does the client have a housing loan?

Loan.description: Does the client have a personal loan?

Contact.description: Most recent mode of contact used in the current compaign.

Day.description: Day of month of last contact.

Duration.description: Duration of last contact, in seconds.

Campaign.description: Number of contacts performed during this campaign and for this client.

PDays.description: Number of days that passed by after the client was last contacted from a previous campaign. -1 Denotes no previous contact.

Previous.description: Number of contacts performed before this campaign and for this client.

POutcome.description: The outcome of the previous marketing campaign.

Outcome.description: Has the client subscribed to a term deposit as part of this marketing campaign?
